title: nepeta argolica
intro: Nepeta argolica, also known as Greek catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Greece and Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Nepeta argolica include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and promote better sleep. Nepeta argolica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also sometimes used in culinary applications, where its flavor is similar to mint.
